name: Golf Evolution
about: Golf Evolution is an indoor golf academy located in downtown Erie, PA, offering comprehensive training and instruction. The facility spans 7,600 square feet and is equipped with state-of-the-art technology, including the GEARS 3D motion capture system, Foresight GCQuad launch monitors, and SAM PuttLab. They provide lessons for all skill levels, from beginners to tour professionals, with a focus on full swing, short game, and putting instruction. Memberships are available on an annual basis from November to October, offering capped access to ensure ample availability.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to world-class technology like GEARS 3D motion capture with 0.2mm accuracy
Instruction from award-winning PGA professionals recognized by Golf Digest
Comprehensive junior and elite programs for competitive golf development

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium photometric camera launch monitor with ball tracking
High-speed motion capture system using 12-14 cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions. For GEARS sessions, one of your clubs will be marked and calibrated.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No specific policy on outside food or drinks is mentioned on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify time for simulator rounds, as the focus is on instruction and practice rather than virtual play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf Evolution offers a Junior Elite Program for ages 12-18 and provides instruction for younger golfers.
